ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "module_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the module */,
  "module_title" TEXT /* Title of the module */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the course (e.g., Compulsory, Optional) */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Credit value of the course */,
  "semester" INTEGER /* Semester in which the course is offered */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the faculty offering the course */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the course */,
  "course_type" TEXT /* Type of the course (e.g., lecture, lab, seminar) */,
  "prerequisites_description" TEXT /* Textual description of prerequisites */,
  "corequisites" TEXT /* List of corequisite courses */,
  "equivalent_courses" TEXT /* List of equivalent courses */,
  "max_enrollment" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the course */,
  "current_enrollment" INTEGER /* Current number of students enrolled in the course */,
  "syllabus_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course syllabus */,
  "course_website" TEXT /* URL of the course website */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the course is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculties ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculties" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty */,
  "faculty_name" TEXT /* Name of the faculty */,
  "dean_name" TEXT /* Name of the dean of the faculty */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the faculty */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the faculty */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the faculty office */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the faculty's website */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the faculty was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the faculty the department belongs to */,
  "chair_name" TEXT /* Name of the department chair */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the department office */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the department's website */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the department was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the university */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the student (e.g., Active, Graduated, On Leave) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "minor" TEXT /* Minor of the student */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Current GPA of the student */,
  "expected_graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected date of graduation */,
  "is_international" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the student is international */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree (e.g., BSc, MSc) */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the faculty offering the program */,
  "duration_years" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in years */,
  "total_credits_required" INTEGER /* Total credits required to graduate from the program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the program */,
  "program_website" TEXT /* URL of the program's website */,
  "admission_requirements" TEXT /* Textual description of admission requirements */,
  "application_deadline" TEXT /* Application deadline for the program */,
  "program_start_date" TEXT /* Date the program starts */,
  "program_end_date" TEXT /* Date the program ends */,
  "is_online" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the program is online */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculties ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program requirement */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "semester" INTEGER /* Semester in which the course should be taken */,
  "min_grade_required" TEXT /* Minimum grade required to pass the course */,
  "is_core" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the course is a core requirement */,
  "is_elective" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the course is an elective */,
  "recommended_semester" INTEGER /* Recommended semester for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_requirements_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_requirements_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prerequisites" (
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prerequisite */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the prerequisite course */,
  "sequence" INTEGER /* Sequence in which the prerequisite should be taken */,
  "prerequisite_description" TEXT /* Textual description of the prerequisite */,
  "prerequisite_type" TEXT /* Type of prerequisite (e.g., must pass, must be taking concurrently) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prerequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_prerequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "semester" INTEGER /* Semester in which the student is enrolled in the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student in the course */,
  "is_waitlisted" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the student is on a waitlist */,
  "waitlist_position" INTEGER /* Position in the waitlist */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., Registered, Waitlisted, Dropped) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculties_departments" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the faculty */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculties_departments_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculties ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculties_departments_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_syllabi" (
  "syllabus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each syllabus */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "syllabus_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the syllabus document */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the syllabus was last updated */,
  "syllabus_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the syllabus */,
  "syllabus_version" TEXT /* Version number of the syllabus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("syllabus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_syllabi_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  "instructor_bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the instructor */,
  "instructor_title" TEXT /* Title of the instructor (e.g., Professor, Assistant Professor) */,
  "instructor_website" TEXT /* URL of the instructor's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "classroom_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the classroom */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the class */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the class */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week the class is held */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor assigned to the class */,
  "is_online" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the class is online */,
  "class_type" TEXT /* Type of class (e.g., lecture, lab, seminar) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_schedules_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_schedules_classroom_id FOREIGN KEY ("classroom_id") REFERENCES classrooms ("classroom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_schedules_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES course_instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classrooms" (
  "classroom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classroom */,
  "classroom_name" TEXT /* Name of the classroom */,
  "building" TEXT /* Building where the classroom is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the classroom */,
  "building_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the building */,
  "building_manager" TEXT /* Name of the building manager */,
  "is_accessible" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the classroom is accessible */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available in the classroom (e.g., projector, whiteboard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classroom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Textual feedback from the student */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the student (1-5) */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_feedback_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_feedback_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_academic_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic plan */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic plan */,
  "plan_description" TEXT /* Description of the academic plan */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the plan was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the plan was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_academic_plans_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the evaluator (faculty member) */,
  "evaluation_text" TEXT /* Textual evaluation of the course */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the evaluator (1-5) */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_evaluations_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES course_instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_evaluations_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
